mnemonic: breath [бре(фс)] дыхание, дышать - Для хорошего дыхания (брос-ай) курить.

examples.eng: Sara took a deep breath.
Let your breath out slowly.
Slow down, I need to catch my breath.
examples.ru: Сбавь скорость / темп /, мне нужно отдышаться.

examples.eng: His breath quickened.
His breath smelt of garlic.
It's so cold outside that I can see my breath.
examples.ru: Так холодно, что видно пар изо рта.

examples.eng: He was panting for breath.
Don't run - you'll be out of breath.
I could smell alcohol on his breath.
Hang on a minute — let me catch my breath!
Hold your breath and count to ten.
examples.ru: Задержи дыхание и сосчитай до десяти.

examples.eng: Shaun took a deep breath and dived in.
examples.ru: Шон сделал глубокий вдох и нырнул.

examples.eng: She drew a deep breath.
His breath stank of alcohol.
examples.ru: От него воняло перегаром. (досл. Его дыхание воняло алкоголем.)

examples.eng: I took a long breath before speaking again.
examples.ru: Я глубоко вздохнул, прежде чем заговорить снова.

examples.eng: Their breath steamed the windows.
I was short of breath climbing uphill.
He was overweight and short of breath.
examples.ru: Он был толстым и страдал одышкой.

examples.eng: Take a deep breath, then exhale slowly.
examples.ru: Сделайте глубокий вдох, затем медленно выдохните.

examples.eng: a dying man gasping for breath
a mint that freshens the breath
Emily drew in her breath sharply.
examples.ru: Эмили резко втянула в себя воздух.

examples.eng: Hold your breath for six seconds.
She stopped and took a deep breath.
examples.ru: Она остановилась и сделала глубокий вдох.

examples.eng: Gilbert was cursing under his breath.
She felt his warm breath on her cheek.
examples.ru: Она почувствовала на своей щеке его теплое дыхание.

examples.eng: Leo could smell the wine on her breath.
examples.ru: Лео почувствовал, что от неё пахнет вином.

examples.eng: He was suffering from shortness of breath.
She took a deep unsteady breath.
His breath has a garlicky smell.
